commentary: Just added six new estate-sale finds to the showroom floor, including a beautiful Adrian Pearsall sectional and a set of Danish teak dining chairs. Come see them Wed-Sun, 10-5, on North Palm Canyon Drive.
We're building a small online shop for the pieces that don't need a showroom visit to fall in love with. More news on the launch soon.
Grateful for another year at Bell Modern. Twenty years in this showroom and still learning something new about mid-century design every week.
Our December sales and inventory review is done. Thank you to everyone who visited the showroom this year, and looking forward to Modernism Week in February.
A George Nelson bubble lamp just came back from restoration looking incredible. Huge thanks to Dave Cooper at Desert Restoration for the careful work.
Excited to be part of Palm Springs Modernism Week again this February. Stop by the showroom for extended hours during the festival.
Modernism Week is here. Bell Modern will have extended showroom hours all week on North Palm Canyon Drive.
My brother Scott's Danish teak dining chairs finally arrived from Portland, restored and ready for the showroom floor.
Hosting Design Drinks again this month. Always love seeing dealers and collectors mingle over pieces before an open showroom weekend.
A pair of Eames lounge chairs just sold to a local collector after months on my want-list radar for them. This is why I love this business.
New year, new inventory. Just back from an estate sale in the Movie Colony neighborhood with a truck full of finds.
Thank you to everyone who came through the showroom during Modernism Week this year. What a week.
Proud to be part of the West Coast Modern Guild's dealer network, trading finds and knowledge with fellow MCM dealers up and down the coast.
A client came in looking for an authenticated Eames piece this week. Reminder that provenance research is half the job in this business.
Closing out the year with the showroom a little quieter than usual, good time for sourcing trips and getting ready for Modernism Week.
